invite_member.title: Invite member
invite_member.subtitle: Generate a link and share it with the person you want to add.
invite_member.success_hint: Share this link privately. Anyone who has it can accept.

errors.not_found_body: This link is invalid. Double-check it or ask the sender for a new one.
errors.expired_body: Ask the sender to generate a new invite link.
errors.accepted_body: This link has already been accepted. Try signing in instead.
errors.email_taken_body: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
